title: Refactor: Implement chain of responsibility pattern
original_text: Refactored to implement chain of responsibility pattern. Added handler chain for request processing. Implemented handler composition. Added chain termination logic. Improved request processing flexibility. Result: chain of responsibility pattern implemented.
expected_subject: refactor(pattern): implement chain of responsibility pattern
expected_body_lines: - Add handler chain for request processing
- Validation: chain of responsibility pattern implemented
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(pattern): implement chain of responsibility pattern"
